channel.title: Log on CGArtLab
channel.description: Recent content in Log on CGArtLab

item.title: Hello World!
item.description:
Hello world

I’m Chenyang, my main job is running a small design company call Polygon Animate.Ltd in China, and other time, I’m a digtal artist, DIYer, teacher and Bloger.

In is homepage, I’ll recording and sharing my learning progress about CG Art, Digital painting, Front end dev, and so on…

Of course, by the way, learning English.

OK, so be it
